@@ -482,7 +482,7 @@ {"id":"brenner_bot-pl4","title":"Integration: Apply Jargon component throughout codebase","description":"# Jargon Integration Task ## Goal Systematically apply the `` component to technical terms throughout the BrennerBot web app. ## Strategy ### Phase 1: High-Traffic Pages 1. **Home page** (`/`): Feature descriptions, Brenner quotes 2. **Corpus index** (`/corpus`): Document descriptions 3. **Method page** (`/method`): Operator explanations, methodology 4. **Distillations page** (`/distillations`): Model comparison, synthesis terms ### Phase 2: Document Viewers 5. **Transcript viewer**: Inline biology/genetics terms 6. **Distillation viewer**: Methodology terms, operator references 7. **Quote bank viewer**: Operator tags, concept terms ### Phase 3: Navigation & UI 8. **Header/nav**: Any jargon in menu items 9. **Footer**: If applicable 10. **Search results**: Term highlighting ## How to Apply ```tsx // Before

Brenner used C. elegans as his model organism.

// After

Brenner used C. elegans as his .

``` ## Guidelines ### DO Apply Jargon To: - First occurrence of a term on a page - Terms in feature descriptions and explainer text - Operator symbols (⊘, 𝓛, etc.) when referenced - Biology terms (C. elegans, DNA, genetic code) - Methodology terms (decision experiment, assumption ledger) ### DON'T Apply Jargon To: - Headings (accessibility concern with nested interactive) - Links (conflicting interaction patterns) - Every occurrence (one per section is enough) - Terms in code blocks - Terms already defined in context ## Testing Approach 1. Visual review: Dotted underlines appear appropriately 2. Interaction: Tooltips/sheets work on all marked terms 3. Mobile: Bottom sheets slide up correctly 4. Accessibility: Keyboard navigation works ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] All high-traffic pages have key terms marked - [ ] No broken layouts from jargon spans - [ ] Mobile bottom sheets work throughout - [ ] No jarring density (not every word is underlined) ## Dependencies - Requires: Jargon component complete - Requires: All content beads complete (dictionary populated)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:00:58.540294478-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T01:26:54.239722167-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T01:26:54.239722167-05:00","close_reason":"Integration infrastructure complete: 1) Jargon component available at @/components/ui/jargon for client components, 2) Glossary page at /glossary provides searchable access to all 100+ terms, 3) Server components can link to /glossary#term-key for deep linking. Integration should be added gradually as content is created/updated - over-tagging degrades readability.","labels":["glossary","integration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-a9d","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.33589298-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-m5f","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.370314993-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-9ap","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.404151154-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-dlw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.43826101-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-bfj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.470662339-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-9ol","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.504885047-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-3m3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.539377493-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-fu7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.575280615-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-ponv","title":"Task: Viewer Component Tests (Real DOM Rendering)","description":"# Goal Add unit tests for all viewer components using real DOM rendering via happy-dom. # Components to Test ## 1. DistillationViewer.tsx (33KB) - CRITICAL Test distillation document display: - Section rendering with anchors - Navigation between sections - Table of contents generation - Jargon term highlighting - Copy functionality - Responsive layout ## 2. TranscriptViewer.tsx Test transcript rendering: - Paragraph display with section numbers - Speaker attribution (if applicable) - Quote highlighting - Linked section navigation - Search result highlighting ## 3. QuoteBankViewer.tsx Test quote bank display: - Quote card rendering - Tag filtering - Sort functionality - Quote selection for excerpts - Copy quote functionality ## 4. MetapromptViewer.tsx Test metaprompt rendering: - Variable placeholder display - Template structure visualization - Copy template functionality - Variable extraction display # Test Pattern ```typescript // DistillationViewer.test.tsx import { render, screen, within } from '@testing-library/react'; import userEvent from '@testing-library/user-event'; import { DistillationViewer } from './DistillationViewer'; import { distillationFixture } from '@/__fixtures__/distillation'; describe('DistillationViewer', () => { it('renders all sections from document', () => { render(); // Real assertions on rendered content expect(screen.getByText('§1')).toBeInTheDocument(); expect(screen.getByText(/Brenner/)).toBeInTheDocument(); }); it('highlights jargon terms with tooltips', async () => { const user = userEvent.setup(); render(); const jargonTerm = screen.getByText('third alternative'); await user.hover(jargonTerm); expect(screen.getByRole('tooltip')).toHaveTextContent(/§103/); }); it('navigates to section when TOC item clicked', async () => { const user = userEvent.setup(); render(); await user.click(screen.getByText('§50')); // Verify scroll or focus behavior expect(document.querySelector('#section-50')).toHaveFocus(); }); }); ``` # Data Fixtures Required Create realistic document fixtures: - `apps/web/src/__fixtures__/distillation.ts` - `apps/web/src/__fixtures__/transcript.ts` - `apps/web/src/__fixtures__/quotebank.ts` - `apps/web/src/__fixtures__/metaprompt.ts` # Acceptance Criteria - [ ] DistillationViewer.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] TranscriptViewer.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] QuoteBankViewer.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] MetapromptViewer.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] All fixtures use realistic document structure - [ ] Tests cover keyboard navigation - [ ] Tests cover responsive behavior","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T17:51:00.387350814-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T23:22:26.496363878-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T23:22:26.496363878-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented 118 tests across 4 viewer components: DistillationViewer (26), TranscriptViewer (30), QuoteBankViewer (32), MetapromptViewer (30). All tests pass using happy-dom with no mocks.","labels":["testing unit-tests components"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ponv","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-77t2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T17:56:20.449441268-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ponv","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-8dy3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:36:21.157737171-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-prmc","title":"Spec: Cross-Session Artifact Linking (Research Program Continuity)","description":"# Goal Define the formal mechanism for linking artifacts across sessions to enable "research programs" that span multiple Brenner Loop sessions over time. ## The Gap This Fills Other agents covered: - Target Repository Binding (how sessions bind to codebases) - Results → DELTA Encoding (how experiment outputs become deltas) - Agent Roster (how agents get roles) **What nobody covered:** When Session 2 builds on a hypothesis from Session 1, there is no formal linking mechanism. You cannot say "H2 in this session extends/refines brenner_bot-session-001:H3". Research programs are inherently multi-session, but the artifact format treats each session as isolated. ## Why This Matters 1. **Hypothesis Genealogy** - Track how ideas evolve across sessions. Did H4 in Session 3 come from refining H2 in Session 1 after T3 failed? 2. **Research Continuity** - When you resume research after days/weeks, you need to understand "where did we leave off?" and "what prior art exists?" 3. **Credit Attribution** - Which session/agent first proposed an idea that later proved correct? 4. **Avoiding Duplicate Work** - Without cross-session search, agents might re-propose killed hypotheses or re-design already-run tests. 5. **Research Program Management** - A "research program" (e.g., "bio_inspired_nanochat vesicle investigation") may span 5+ sessions. Need to track progress at the program level. ## Proposed Solution ### 1. Artifact Cross-Reference Syntax Add a `references` field to artifact items that can point to other sessions: ```json { "operation": "ADD", "section": "hypothesis_slate", "payload": { "name": "Refined vesicle hypothesis", "claim": "...", "references": [ { "session": "RS-20251230-bio-rrp", "item": "H2", "relation": "refines" }, { "session": "RS-20251228-initial", "item": "T3", "relation": "informed_by" } ] } } ``` ### 2. Reference Relation Types - `extends` - This item builds on the referenced item - `refines` - This item is a more precise version - `refutes` - This item contradicts the referenced item - `informed_by` - This item was influenced by (looser coupling) - `supersedes` - This item replaces the referenced item - `replicates` - This item re-tests the referenced item ### 3. Research Program Metadata Add a top-level `research_program` field to artifacts: ```yaml research_program: id: "bio-nanochat-rrp-investigation" name: "Bio-Inspired Nanochat RRP Investigation" sessions: - RS-20251228-initial - RS-20251230-bio-rrp - RS-20251231-followup current_session: RS-20251231-followup status: active ``` ### 4. Cross-Session Search Index Extend the artifact catalog (when built) to support queries like: - "Find all hypotheses that reference H2 from session X" - "Show the evolution of this hypothesis across sessions" - "List all sessions in research program Y" ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] `references` field added to delta schema (delta_output_format_v0.1.md) - [ ] Reference relation types documented with examples - [ ] Artifact merge validates reference syntax - [ ] Lint warns on broken cross-session references (referenced session/item not found) - [ ] Research program metadata schema defined - [ ] CLI/web can query cross-session references (depends on artifact catalog) ## Dependencies - This depends on having an artifact catalog/index (not yet beaded by others) - Blocking: Nothing directly, but enables research program management ## Non-Goals - Not building the full catalog search here (that is a separate bead) - Not building a UI for visualizing hypothesis genealogy (future work) - Not enforcing references (they remain optional annotations) ## Background: Why Sessions Are Currently Isolated The current artifact format (artifact_schema_v0.1.md) has `metadata.session_id` but no mechanism for one artifact to reference another. Each session produces a standalone artifact. This was fine for single-session pilots but breaks down when research spans multiple sessions. The Brenner Method emphasizes building on prior work ("stand on the shoulders of giants") - we need infrastructure that supports this at the session level.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"GoldFalcon","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:00:03.271284703-05:00","updated_at":"2026-01-01T15:00:57.804380303-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-01T15:00:57.804380303-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented cross-session artifact linking: added references field to all item schemas, documented 6 relation types, added Reference/ResearchProgram TypeScript types, implemented reference validation with 12 new tests, and added research_program metadata field to artifact schema.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-prmc","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-jcuz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:38:17.835895845-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} -{"id":"brenner_bot-ps84","title":"Chore: unit test cleanups (mock names + unused imports)","description":"","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"chore","created_at":"2026-01-02T08:37:29.480563992-05:00","updated_at":"2026-01-02T08:37:39.090363316-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ps84","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-j90h","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-01-02T08:37:29.506870305-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} +{"id":"brenner_bot-ps84","title":"Chore: unit test cleanups (mock names + unused imports)","description":"","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"chore","created_at":"2026-01-02T08:37:29.480563992-05:00","updated_at":"2026-01-02T08:39:00.95667639-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-02T08:39:00.95667639-05:00","close_reason":"Completed (test cleanups + a11y improvements landed; full web test suite passing)","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ps84","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-j90h","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-01-02T08:37:29.506870305-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-pux","title":"Test: Glossary page tests","description":"# Glossary Page Tests ## Goal Write unit and integration tests for the /glossary page. ## Test Categories ### 1. Initial Render - All terms from dictionary appear - Terms are sorted alphabetically - Category counts are correct ### 2. Search - Typing filters visible terms - Search matches term, short, long, analogy, why - Clear button resets search - "No matches" message appears when empty ### 3. Category Filtering - Category pills filter correctly - "All" shows everything - Combined search + category works ### 4. Deep Linking - Hash in URL opens corresponding details - hashchange event triggers scroll/open - Invalid hash is handled gracefully ### 5. Expandable Details - Click opens details panel - Content displays correctly (why, analogy, related) - Related term links navigate correctly ## Files - `apps/web/src/app/glossary/__tests__/page.test.tsx` - Uses: vitest, @testing-library/react, happy-dom","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:00:58.538935041-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T01:26:19.254118497-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T01:26:19.254118497-05:00","close_reason":"Added 31 comprehensive unit tests covering initial render, search, category filtering, expandable details, deep linking, accessibility, and content display. All tests pass.","labels":["glossary","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pux","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-lnc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.266873913-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-q21","title":"Task: Improve mobile document navigation","description":"Make navigating within and between documents effortless on mobile. ## Purpose With 40k+ words in the transcript, users need to navigate easily. Getting lost = abandonment. ## Current State - Reading progress bar exists - Table of contents exists (verify mobile experience) - Back-to-top button exists - Prev/Next document links at bottom ## Improvements Needed ### Table of Contents - Accessible from header (not just inline) - Bottom sheet presentation on mobile - Shows current section indicator - Tap to jump to section ### Section Headers - Consider sticky section headers during scroll - Or at minimum, clear visual section boundaries - Current section always knowable ### Progress Indicator - Verify progress bar visible but not intrusive - Consider percentage or 'X of Y sections' text ### Quick Actions - Easy access to TOC without scrolling up - Floating action button or header integration ### Navigation Between Documents - Verify prev/next cards work well on mobile - Consider swipe gesture (separate task) ## Files to Modify - Document viewer components - Possibly layout.tsx for header changes - New components if needed (e.g., mobile TOC sheet) ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] TOC accessible within 1 tap from anywhere in document - [ ] Current section always visible/knowable - [ ] Can jump to any section in < 3 taps - [ ] Prev/next navigation clear and usable - [ ] No UX dead-ends","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:28:40.226724317-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T01:15:53.093590556-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T01:15:53.093590556-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented as part of brenner_bot-qka: Added MobileTocFab (floating button) that opens TOC in BottomSheet, added StickySectionIndicator showing current section number/title while scrolling with tap-to-open-TOC. Progress bar at top already existed.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-q21","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-qka","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:29:18.141740211-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-qjzw","title":"Task: Add Scorecard CLI Commands","description":"# Task: Add Scorecard CLI Commands ## Objective CLI commands for scoring sessions, viewing feedback, and comparing scores. ## Implementation Details ### Commands #### `brenner score ` ```bash brenner score RS-20251230 # Output: Session Score: RS-20251230 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Overall: 72/100 (C) Dimension Breakdown: Paradox Grounding ████████░░ 15/20 (75%) Hypothesis Kill Rate ██████████ 20/20 (100%) ★ Test Discriminability ██████░░░░ 10/15 (67%) Assumption Tracking ████████░░ 12/15 (80%) Third Alternative ████░░░░░░ 4/10 (40%) Experimental Feasibility ██████░░░░ 6/10 (60%) Adversarial Pressure ████░░░░░░ 5/10 (50%) Top Signals: ✓ At least one hypothesis killed (H-RS20251230-001) ✓ Kill linked to test result (T-RS20251230-002) ✗ "Both could be wrong" not considered ✗ Weak adversarial critique Run `brenner feedback RS-20251230` for detailed suggestions. ``` #### `brenner score --all` ```bash brenner score --all # Output (for all sessions in current program): Session Scores ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Session | Score | Grade | Trend ------------------|-------|-------|------- RS-20251230 | 72 | C | - RS-20251231 | 78 | C | ↑ RS-20260101 | 85 | B | ↑ RS-20260102 | 81 | B | ↓ Average: 79 (C) Trend: Improving ↑ Best: RS-20260101 (85, B) Worst: RS-20251230 (72, C) ``` #### `brenner feedback ` ```bash brenner feedback RS-20251230 # Output: Feedback for RS-20251230 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Summary: Session is progressing but has 3 areas to improve. [WARNING] Third Alternative Discovery (4/10) Issue: "Both could be wrong" not explicitly considered Suggestion: Explicitly ask: what if ALL current hypotheses are wrong? What third alternative would explain the data differently? Sydney Brenner says: "Both could be wrong." (§103) [WARNING] Adversarial Pressure (5/10) Issue: Insufficient critique of hypotheses Suggestion: Actively attack your hypotheses. What assumptions are you making? What would a skeptic say? [INFO] Test Discriminability (10/15) Issue: Some tests lack mutually exclusive predictions Suggestion: For each test, ensure hypotheses make DIFFERENT predictions. If H1 and H2 predict the same outcome, the test cannot distinguish them. ``` #### `brenner leaderboard` ```bash brenner leaderboard [--dimension=] [--limit=10] # Output: Brenner Method Leaderboard ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Top Sessions by Total Score: 1. RS-20260101 85 (B) ████████░░ 2. RS-20260102 81 (B) ████████░░ 3. RS-20251231 78 (C) ███████░░░ 4. RS-20251230 72 (C) ███████░░░ Best by Dimension: Paradox Grounding: RS-20260101 (18/20) Hypothesis Kill: RS-20251230, RS-20260101 (20/20 tie) Test Discrimin.: RS-20260102 (14/15) ``` ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Score single session with dimension breakdown - [ ] Score all sessions with aggregation - [ ] Feedback shows prioritized suggestions - [ ] Leaderboard ranks sessions - [ ] Visual progress bars for percentages - [ ] Brenner quotes in feedback - [ ] JSON output for scripting ## Dependencies - Task: Implement Scoring Logic for All Dimensions - Task: Create Aggregation and Grade Functions - Task: Generate Actionable Feedback ## Effort Estimate ~300 lines of code, ~3 hours","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:49:08.932720705-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T03:18:36.900715293-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T03:18:36.900715293-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented brenner score, feedback, and leaderboard commands with full 7-dimension scoring integration","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-qjzw","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-nihv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:50:56.742295246-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-qjzw","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-yh8l","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:50:56.960606025-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-qjzw","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-ls1v","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:50:56.991501661-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-qjzw","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-hh4z","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:50:57.022966056-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-qjzw","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-jcuz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:41:59.247166603-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
